Suguru becomes severely depressed after the mission to protect Riko has failed. How she was shot before his eyes and drops dead. How her innocent eyes turned into what was lifeless in seconds has changed something in Suguru. And he could not defeat the murderer. A monkey without a cursing power like Toji... could easily defeat a great Jujustu Sorcerer?

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

I wanted to try something new

Something sad and sensitiv. Suguru is so well written Character.... its a shame the he turned evil.
